name: Chocolate Amaretto Cheesecake2
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Cream cheese light process product
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle chocolate wafer crumbs in the bottom of a 7-inch+ springform pan. Set aside.
2. Position knife blade in food processor bowl; add cream cheese and next 8 ingredients, processing until smooth. Add egg and process just until blended. Fold in semisweet chocolate morsels.
3. Slowly pour mixture over crumbs in the pan. Bake at 300°F for 65 to 70 minutes or until cheesecake is set. Let cool in the pan on a wire rack.
4. Cover and chill at least 8 hours. Remove sides of the pan, and transfer cheesecake to a serving platter. Garnish with chocolate curls if desired.
Yield: 12 servings
Note: You can substitute an 8-inch pan for this cheesecake recipe, if desired. The larger cheesecake will require only 45 to 50 minutes baking time. To make chocolate curls, melt 3 squares semisweet chocolate. Pour the melted chocolate onto wax paper and spread to a 3-inch wide strip. Let stand until cool but not firm. Pull a vegetable peeler across the chocolate, and transfer curls to a plate. Store chocolate curls in the freezer.
